title: Section 15
content: Whoever attempts to commit an offence referred to in 1[clause (a)] of sub-section (1) of section 13 shall be punishable with imprisonment for a term 2[which shall not be less than two years but which may extend to five years] and with fine.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 9, ibid., for "clause (c) or clause (d)" (w.e.f. 26-7-2018). 2. Subs. by Act 1 of 2014, s. 58 and the Sch., for "which may extend to three years" (w.e.f. 16-1-2014).
